title: ZMK Keymap Parser
description: Parse the ZMK devicetree keymap file to extract layer definitions, key bindings, combos, and home-row mod configuration. Foundation that all training lessons are built from.

title: Devicetree tokenizer
description: Tokenize ZMK .keymap devicetree syntax into structured tokens (nodes, properties, references, includes)

title: Lex devicetree nodes, properties, and values
description: Build a lexer that handles DT node syntax: node-name { ... }, property = <value>, #include, etc.

title: Handle ZMK-specific macros and references
description: Parse &kp, &mt, &lt, &trans, &none and other ZMK behavior references

title: Layer extraction
description: Extract layer definitions with key bindings from parsed keymap, mapping physical positions to characters/actions

title: Parse BASE layer key bindings to character map
description: Map each physical key position (0-37) to its base character output (Colemak DH layout)

title: Parse NAV layer bindings (numbers, arrows, brackets)
description: Extract NAV layer: numbers 0-9, arrow keys, brackets, parens

title: Parse SYM layer bindings (symbols, media)
description: Extract SYM layer: !, @, #, etc. Map to typeable characters

title: Extract home-row mod configuration
description: Identify hold-tap keys and their tap vs hold behaviors (e.g. A=tap, GUI=hold)

title: Keymap data model
description: Go structs representing the full keymap: layers, keys, behaviors, combos, physical layout

title: Define Layer, Key, and Behavior types
description: Core Go types: Layer (name, keys), Key (position, tap, hold, type), Behavior (kp, mt, lt, trans, none)

title: Define physical layout mapping (position to row/col/hand)
description: Map key positions 0-37 to physical metadata: which hand, row, column, finger assignment

title: Lesson Engine
description: Progressive lesson system with structured stages and adaptive per-key drilling. Generates typing exercises based on parsed keymap data.

title: Structured lesson stages
description: Predefined progression: home row → top row → bottom row → thumb keys → NAV numbers → SYM symbols. User selects which stage to practice.

title: Home row lesson (Colemak DH: arstdhnei o)
description: Generate exercises using only home row keys. First lesson a new user should do.

title: Top row lesson (qwfpg jluy;)
description: Add top row keys. Can combine with home row for mixed practice.

title: Bottom row lesson (zxcvb km,./) + pinky keys
description: Add bottom row including the extra pinky columns (ESC, backslash)

title: NAV layer numbers and brackets lesson
description: Practice typing numbers 0-9 and bracket pairs via NAV layer hold

title: SYM layer symbols lesson
description: Practice common symbols (!, @, #, $, %, ^, &, *, ~, backtick, pipe, underscore) via SYM layer hold

title: Adaptive per-key drilling
description: Within each stage, track per-key accuracy and speed. Weight exercise generation toward weak keys. keybr-inspired algorithm.

title: Track per-key hit/miss during a session
description: Record every keystroke: expected char, actual char, time delta. Build accuracy and speed profile per key.

title: Weight word/sequence generation toward weak keys
description: When generating next exercise, bias toward words containing keys with lower accuracy or higher latency

title: Unlock threshold: promote to next stage when accuracy > 95% and WPM > threshold
description: Suggest stage progression when current stage keys are consistently accurate

title: Exercise generation
description: Generate typing exercises from wordlists and key sets. Support words, bigrams, and mixed-layer sequences.

title: Word-based exercises from filtered wordlists
description: Filter built-in wordlist to only include words typeable with the current stage's unlocked keys

title: Bigram/trigram drills for difficult key transitions
description: Generate targeted n-gram sequences for finger transitions that are slow or error-prone

title: Mixed-layer exercises (e.g. type 'ls -la ~/projects')
description: Real-world command-like exercises that require layer switching (numbers, symbols, paths)

title: TUI Application
description: Bubble Tea terminal UI with lesson selection, real-time typing display, accuracy highlighting, WPM tracking, and results screen.

title: Main menu and navigation
description: App chrome: main menu with lesson selection, settings, stats view. Bubble Tea model with screen routing.

title: Main menu screen (Practice / Stats / Settings / Quit)
description: Landing screen with lipgloss-styled menu. Navigate with arrows or j/k.

title: Lesson picker: browse stages, see lock/unlock status
description: List available stages. Show which are unlocked. Select to start a session.

title: Screen routing between menu, lesson, results, stats
description: Bubble Tea model switching between different app screens/views

title: Typing session view
description: Core typing experience: display target text, capture input, highlight correct/incorrect characters in real-time, show live WPM.

title: Render target text with cursor position
description: Display the exercise text. Highlight current position. Scroll if text is longer than viewport.

title: Real-time character matching with color feedback
description: Green for correct, red for incorrect, dim for upcoming. Update on every keystroke.

title: Live WPM and accuracy counter
description: Calculate and display WPM and accuracy % updating in real-time during the session

title: Handle backspace, line wrapping, and edge cases
description: Allow corrections via backspace. Handle word wrap at terminal width. Handle end of exercise.

title: Results screen
description: Post-session summary: WPM, accuracy, per-key breakdown, weakest keys, suggestion for next practice.

title: Session summary: WPM, accuracy, time, key count
description: Display final stats after completing an exercise

title: Per-key accuracy breakdown (worst keys highlighted)
description: Show which keys had the most errors. Suggest focusing on them.

title: Stats & Persistence
description: Track per-key accuracy and speed, session results, and historical progress. Store in JSON at ~/.config/totem-trainer/. Surface trends and per-key heatmaps.

title: Session storage
description: Persist session results to ~/.config/totem-trainer/history.json. Append-only log of every session.

title: Define session result schema (timestamp, stage, WPM, accuracy, duration, per-key stats)
description: JSON schema for a single session record

title: Write session results after each completed exercise
description: Append to history file on session completion. Create config dir if missing.

title: Load historical sessions for stats views
description: Read and deserialize the history file for display in stats screens

title: Progress tracking and trends
description: Aggregate stats over time: WPM trend, accuracy trend, per-key improvement, stage completion status.

title: WPM and accuracy trend over last N sessions
description: Calculate rolling averages. Show improvement or regression.

title: Per-key accuracy heatmap (cumulative)
description: Aggregate per-key stats across all sessions. Render as a keyboard-shaped heatmap in the TUI showing hot/cold keys.

title: Stage unlock tracking (which stages are mastered)
description: Track which stages have hit the unlock threshold. Persist so progress survives restarts.
